---
title: ""
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r128/three.min.js"></script>

<!-- ── HERO ───────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="cover" id="cover">
  <canvas id="particle-canvas" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;opacity:0.25;"></canvas>

  <div class="cover-text" id="cover-text">
    <span class="cover-eyebrow">Encargo de servicio · Tragsatec para AEMET</span>
    <h1 class="cover-title">Predicción<br>Estacional</h1>
    <div class="cover-line"></div>
    <p class="cover-sub">
      Área de Evaluación y Modelización del Clima<br>
      <strong>AEMET · 2024–2026</strong>
    </p>
    <div class="cover-logos">
      <a href="https://www.aemet.es/es/portada" target="_blank">
        <img src="images/logos/aemet.png" alt="AEMET"/>
      </a>
      <span class="cover-sep"></span>
      <a href="https://www.tragsa.es/es/Paginas/default.aspx" target="_blank">
        <img src="images/logos/tragsatec.jpg" alt="Tragsatec"/>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="cover-globe">
    <div id="earth-canvas" style="width:100%;height:100%;"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── STRIP AUTORES ──────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="authors-strip">
  Marta Domínguez · Martín Senande · Sabela Sanfiz
  <span style="opacity:0.5;margin:0 0.5rem;"></span>
  <em>(Tragsatec)</em>
  <span style="opacity:0.5;margin:0 0.8rem;">·</span>
  Esteban Rodríguez
  <span style="opacity:0.5;margin:0 0.5rem;"></span>
  <em>(AEMET)</em>
</div>

<!-- ── CONTADORES ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="counters-section reveal-section">
  <div class="counter-item">
    <span class="counter-value" data-target="20945" data-suffix="">0</span>
    <span class="counter-label">celdas de la malla</span>
    <span class="counter-sub">5×5 km · Península + Baleares</span>
  </div>
  <div class="counter-divider"></div>
  <div class="counter-item">
    <span class="counter-value" data-target="3" data-suffix="">0</span>
    <span class="counter-label">modelos globales</span>
    <span class="counter-sub">ECMWF-SEAS5.1 · DWD · CMCC</span>
  </div>
  <div class="counter-divider"></div>
  <div class="counter-item">
    <span class="counter-value" data-target="5" data-suffix=" km">0</span>
    <span class="counter-label">resolución espacial</span>
    <span class="counter-sub">20× más fina que los modelos globales</span>
  </div>
  <div class="counter-divider"></div>
  <div class="counter-item">
    <span class="counter-value" data-target="6" data-suffix=" meses">0</span>
    <span class="counter-label">horizonte de predicción</span>
    <span class="counter-sub">Actualización periódica</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── FLIP CARDS ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="flip-section">

  <div class="flip-wrap reveal-section" data-delay="0">
    <div class="flip-card">
      <div class="flip-front">
        <span class="flip-icon">📡</span>
        <h3>Datos</h3>
        <p>C3S · ECMWF-SEAS5.1 · DWD · CMCC</p>
        <span class="flip-hint">hover para más info</span>
      </div>
      <div class="flip-back">
        <h3>Datos</h3>
        <p>Descarga mediante la API oficial de Copernicus (<code>cdsapi</code>). Variables: MSL, Z500, T2M, TP. Período: hindcast + predicción en tiempo real.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="flip-wrap reveal-section" data-delay="100">
    <div class="flip-card">
      <div class="flip-front">
        <span class="flip-icon">🗺️</span>
        <h3>Downscaling</h3>
        <p>Análogos sinópticos · 5×5 km</p>
        <span class="flip-hint">hover para más info</span>
      </div>
      <div class="flip-back">
        <h3>Downscaling</h3>
        <p>Algoritmo de análogos sinópticos de AEMET. Calibración con ERA5 (1981–1996) y base de precipitación ROCÍO_IBEB. 20.945 celdas sobre la Península e Islas Baleares.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="flip-wrap reveal-section" data-delay="200">
    <div class="flip-card">
      <div class="flip-front">
        <span class="flip-icon">⚖️</span>
        <h3>Weighting</h3>
        <p>EOF · PLS · ponderación de ensemble</p>
        <span class="flip-hint">hover para más info</span>
      </div>
      <div class="flip-back">
        <h3>Weighting</h3>
        <p>Modos de variabilidad Euro-Atlánticos (NAO, EA, EAWR, SCA). Ponderación EOF para invierno, PLS para temperatura en estación cálida (AMJ–ASO).</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="flip-wrap reveal-section" data-delay="300">
    <div class="flip-card">
      <div class="flip-front">
        <span class="flip-icon">🌊</span>
        <h3>Cuencas</h3>
        <p>Cuencas hidrográficas españolas</p>
        <span class="flip-hint">hover para más info</span>
      </div>
      <div class="flip-back">
        <h3>Cuencas</h3>
        <p>Análisis de predicción estacional desagregado por cuenca hidrográfica. Proyecto en desarrollo — próximamente disponible.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<style>
/* ── Cover ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cover {
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  min-height: 65vh;
  padding: 0 4rem;
  gap: 2rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #001a5e 0%, #003087 50%, #005aad 100%);
}

.cover-text {
  flex: 1;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  animation: fadeInLeft 0.9s ease both;
}

.cover-eyebrow {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.cover-title {
  font-size: 4.5rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: white;
  line-height: 1;
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}

.cover-line {
  width: 60px;
  height: 3px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  margin: 1.2rem 0;
}

.cover-sub {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
  line-height: 1.7;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.cover-logos {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1.5rem;
}

.cover-logos img {
  height: 42px;
  object-fit: contain;
  opacity: 0.9;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}

.cover-logos img:hover { opacity: 1; }

.cover-sep {
  width: 1px;
  height: 32px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
}

.cover-globe {
  flex: 0 0 500px;
  height: 500px;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  animation: fadeInRight 1s ease both;
  margin-right: -2rem;
}

/* ── Authors strip ───────────────────────────────────── */
.authors-strip {
  background: white;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #dde3ed;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 0.7rem 1rem;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #4a5568;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}

/* ── Counters ────────────────────────────────────────── */
.counters-section {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1px 1fr 1px 1fr 1px 1fr;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 2.5rem 4rem;
  background: #003087;
}

.counter-item {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 0 1rem;
}

.counter-value {
  display: block;
  font-size: 2.8rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: white;
  line-height: 1;
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
}

.counter-label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
  margin-top: 0.4rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
}

.counter-sub {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
  margin-top: 0.3rem;
}

.counter-divider {
  width: 1px;
  height: 60px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
  justify-self: center;
}

/* ── Flip cards ──────────────────────────────────────── */
.flip-section {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 1.5rem;
  padding: 3rem 4rem;
  background: #f4f8fd;
}

.flip-wrap {
  perspective: 1000px;
  height: 220px;
}

.flip-card {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  transform-style: preserve-3d;
  transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
}

.flip-wrap:hover .flip-card {
  transform: rotateY(180deg);
}

.flip-front,
.flip-back {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  backface-visibility: hidden;
  -webkit-backface-visibility: hidden;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.8rem 1.6rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  text-align: center;
}

.flip-front {
  background: white;
  border: 1px solid #dde3ed;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,48,135,0.07);
}

.flip-back {
  background: #003087;
  transform: rotateY(180deg);
}

.flip-icon {
  font-size: 2rem;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}

.flip-front h3 {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #003087;
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem;
}

.flip-front p {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #8892a4;
  line-height: 1.5;
  margin: 0;
}

.flip-hint {
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  color: #c0cce0;
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
}

.flip-back h3 {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: white;
  margin: 0 0 0.6rem;
}

.flip-back p {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin: 0;
}

.flip-back code {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
  padding: 1px 5px;
  border-radius: 3px;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
}

/* ── Scroll reveal ───────────────────────────────────── */
.reveal-section {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(28px);
  transition: opacity 0.7s ease, transform 0.7s ease;
}

.reveal-section.visible {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

/* ── Animations ──────────────────────────────────────── */
@keyframes fadeInLeft {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-30px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
}

@keyframes fadeInRight {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(30px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .cover { flex-direction: column; padding: 3rem 2rem; min-height: auto; }
  .cover-globe { flex: 0 0 300px; height: 300px; margin-right: 0; }
  .cover-title { font-size: 3rem; }
  .counters-section { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; padding: 2rem; }
  .counter-divider { display: none; }
  .flip-section { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; padding: 2rem; }
}
</style>

<script>
/* ── Partículas ── */
(function() {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('particle-canvas');
  if (!canvas) return;
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  function resize() { canvas.width = canvas.offsetWidth; canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight; }
  resize();
  window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
  const particles = Array.from({length: 50}, () => ({
    x: Math.random() * canvas.width, y: Math.random() * canvas.height,
    r: Math.random() * 1.5 + 0.4,
    vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.25, vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.25,
    alpha: Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.2
  }));
  function draw() {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    particles.forEach(p => {
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.r, 0, Math.PI*2);
      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(150,200,255,${p.alpha})`; ctx.fill();
      p.x += p.vx; p.y += p.vy;
      if (p.x < 0 || p.x > canvas.width) p.vx *= -1;
      if (p.y < 0 || p.y > canvas.height) p.vy *= -1;
    });
    particles.forEach((p, i) => {
      particles.slice(i+1).forEach(q => {
        const d = Math.hypot(p.x-q.x, p.y-q.y);
        if (d < 100) {
          ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(p.x, p.y); ctx.lineTo(q.x, q.y);
          ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(150,200,255,${0.06*(1-d/100)})`; ctx.lineWidth = 0.5; ctx.stroke();
        }
      });
    });
    requestAnimationFrame(draw);
  }
  draw();
})();

/* ── Scroll reveal ───────────────────────────────────── */
(function() {
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        const delay = entry.target.dataset.delay || 0;
        setTimeout(() => entry.target.classList.add('visible'), parseInt(delay));
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.15 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal-section').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
})();

/* ── Contadores animados ─────────────────────────────── */
(function() {
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
      entry.target.querySelectorAll('.counter-value').forEach(el => {
        if (el.dataset.animated) return;
        el.dataset.animated = 'true';
        const target = parseInt(el.dataset.target);
        const suffix = el.dataset.suffix || '';
        const duration = target > 1000 ? 2000 : 1000;
        const start = performance.now();
        function step(now) {
          const p = Math.min((now - start) / duration, 1);
          const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - p, 3);
          el.textContent = Math.round(target * eased).toLocaleString('es-ES') + suffix;
          if (p < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
        }
        requestAnimationFrame(step);
      });
      obs.unobserve(entry.target);
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.3 });
  document.querySelectorAll('.counters-section').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
})();

/* ── Globo Three.js con órbitas reales ── */
(function() {
  function initEarth() {
    const mount = document.getElementById('earth-canvas');
    if (!mount || mount.dataset.mounted === 'true') return;
    mount.dataset.mounted = 'true';
    const w = mount.clientWidth, h = mount.clientHeight;
    const scene = new THREE.Scene();
    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(45, w/h, 0.1, 1000);
    camera.position.z = 3.9;
    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ alpha: true, antialias: true });
    renderer.setSize(w, h);
    renderer.setPixelRatio(window.devicePixelRatio);
    mount.appendChild(renderer.domElement);

    const loader = new THREE.TextureLoader();
    const earthSolid = new THREE.Mesh(
      new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.99, 48, 32),
      new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
        map: loader.load('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/mrdoob/three.js@r128/examples/textures/planets/earth_atmos_2048.jpg'),
        transparent: true, opacity: 0.95
      })
    );
    scene.add(earthSolid);

    const earth = new THREE.Mesh(
      new THREE.SphereGeometry(1, 48, 32),
      new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0x4499ff, wireframe: true, transparent: true, opacity: 0.20 })
    );
    scene.add(earth);

    const DEG = Math.PI / 180;
    const orbitDefs = [
      { name:'ISS',       a:1.12, inc:51.6, raan:0,   color:0x88ccff, r:0.022, phase:0.0 },
      { name:'Polar Met', a:1.13, inc:90,   raan:60,  color:0xffffff, r:0.018, phase:1.2 },
      { name:'Sentinel',  a:1.14, inc:98,   raan:130, color:0x88ff44, r:0.018, phase:2.5 },
      { name:'GPS',       a:1.55, inc:55,   raan:200, color:0xffcc00, r:0.026, phase:0.8 },
      { name:'GPS-2',     a:1.55, inc:55,   raan:320, color:0xffcc00, r:0.026, phase:3.5 },
      { name:'GEO',       a:1.80, inc:0,    raan:0,   color:0xff6688, r:0.024, phase:0.0 },
    ];

    function orbitalToWorld(a, theta, incDeg, raanDeg) {
      const inc = incDeg * DEG, raan = raanDeg * DEG;
      const xO = a * Math.cos(theta), zO = a * Math.sin(theta);
      const yI = zO * Math.sin(inc), zI = zO * Math.cos(inc);
      return {
        x: xO * Math.cos(raan) - zI * Math.sin(raan),
        y: yI,
        z: xO * Math.sin(raan) + zI * Math.cos(raan)
      };
    }

    function createOrbitLine(def) {
      const pts = [];
      for (let i = 0; i <= 256; i++) {
        const theta = (i/256) * Math.PI * 2;
        const p = orbitalToWorld(def.a, theta, def.inc, def.raan);
        pts.push(new THREE.Vector3(p.x, p.y, p.z));
      }
      return new THREE.Line(
        new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints(pts),
        new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({ color: def.color, transparent: true, opacity: 0.15 })
      );
    }

    const wLEO = 0.012;
    const sats = orbitDefs.map(def => {
      scene.add(createOrbitLine(def));
      const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(
        new THREE.SphereGeometry(def.r, 8, 8),
        new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: def.color })
      );
      const halo = new THREE.Mesh(
        new THREE.SphereGeometry(def.r * 2, 8, 8),
        new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: def.color, transparent: true, opacity: 0.2 })
      );
      mesh.add(halo);
      scene.add(mesh);
      return { mesh, def, phase: def.phase, w: wLEO * Math.pow(1.12/def.a, 1.5) };
    });

    const wEarth = wLEO * Math.pow(1.12/1.80, 1.5);
    let t = 0, dragging = false, lastX = 0, lastY = 0, rx = 0.15, ry = 0;
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('mousedown', e => { dragging=true; lastX=e.clientX; lastY=e.clientY; });
    window.addEventListener('mouseup', () => dragging=false);
    window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
      if (!dragging) return;
      ry += (e.clientX-lastX)*0.01; rx += (e.clientY-lastY)*0.01;
      lastX=e.clientX; lastY=e.clientY;
    });

    function animate() {
      t += 1;
      if (!dragging) ry += wEarth;
      earthSolid.rotation.y = ry; earthSolid.rotation.x = rx;
      earth.rotation.y = ry; earth.rotation.x = rx;
      sats.forEach(s => {
        const theta = t * s.w + s.phase;
        const p = orbitalToWorld(s.def.a, theta, s.def.inc, s.def.raan);
        s.mesh.position.set(p.x, p.y, p.z);
      });
      renderer.render(scene, camera);
      requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }
    animate();

    window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
      const nw = mount.clientWidth, nh = mount.clientHeight;
      if (!nw || !nh) return;
      camera.aspect = nw/nh; camera.updateProjectionMatrix(); renderer.setSize(nw, nh);
    });
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initEarth);
  } else { setTimeout(initEarth, 100); }
})();
</script>
```
